message:
fix(sync): pass baton on generation-changed notify_one and explicit drop in stealer

Notify: When a waiter observes a generation change that was triggered
by a notify_one, pass the baton to the next waiter via pass_baton()
instead of simply dropping the lock. Without this, the one-shot
notification could be consumed by a waiter that was already completing
due to a generation change, leaving the intended next-in-line waiter
permanently stuck.

Stealer: Add explicit drop(stack) before returning from steal() to
release the mutex guard before the arena closure returns. This
addresses the clippy::significant_drop_tightening lint at the source
rather than suppressing it, ensuring the lock is not held longer than
necessary during task removal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
